hero.title: Packers & Movers in Manipur
hero.subtitle: Imphal and across the Jewelled Land — 373+ verified movers in Manipur.

intro:
Manipur, known as the Jewelled Land of India, has Imphal as its capital and one of Northeast India's most culturally rich urban centres. Radhe packers and movers connects you with 373+ verified movers in Imphal, serving the state's government and residential relocation needs.

From Imphal's polo-ground vicinity government housing to the new residential areas along the National Highway, our KYC-verified vendors understand Manipur's unique logistics and hill-to-valley move challenges.
whyUs: Manipur's dependency on the NH-37 (Imphal-Jiribam) and NH-2 (Imphal-Moreh) highways for all supplies means route planning is critical. Our vendors monitor road conditions, carry ₹5 lakh damage coverage and GPS tracking, and plan long-haul moves through Guwahati efficiently.

faqs.q: How much do packers and movers cost in Manipur?
faqs.a: Local moves within Imphal start at ₹5,000. Imphal to Guwahati inter-state moves (700 km via NH routes) typically cost ₹13,000–₹22,000 including packing.

faqs.q: Which cities in Manipur does Radhe packers and movers cover?
faqs.a: We cover Imphal city. For other Manipur district towns, we coordinate through our Northeast network.

faqs.q: Can you handle moves from Manipur to mainland India?
faqs.a: Yes. All inter-state moves from Imphal are coordinated through our Guwahati hub to any Indian city, with GPS tracking and transit insurance.

faqs.q: Do you handle moves during Manipur's insurgency-related road closures?
faqs.a: Yes. We monitor NH conditions and have contingency routing. Customers are notified of delays and given flexible rescheduling at no charge.
